title: CRITICAL: Enforce pre-check gates across all high-risk actions
description: Agent skips pre-checks 86% of the time. Same pattern across code (push without lint), trading (deploy without risk controls), and analysis (report without verifying data). Root cause: bias toward action over verification.

examples: Reported -70% PnL without verifying sim vs real

suggested_actions: Before git push: MUST run lint + tests locally
Before any trade: MUST verify risk controls are active
Before reporting numbers: MUST verify data source (sim vs real)
Before any external action: pause and verify preconditions
Add VBR checkpoint to AGENTS.md as hard rule
